message.content:
@startuml
skinparam UMLSequenceDiagram {
    fontName "Helvetica"
    fontColor "black"
    participantStyle "fill: #f0f0f0; stroke: #666; stroke-width: 2px"
}

participant "Customer" as C1
participant "Customer" as C2

participant "Shopware Platform" as SP
    participant "Checkout" as CH
    participant "Asynchronous Payment Handler" as AHP

participant "External System" as ES
    participant "Payment Platform" as EP

C1 -->|pay| CH
CH -->|pay| AHP
AHP -->|redirect| C2
C2 -->|pay| CH
CH -->|finalize| AHP

ES -->|redirect| CH
CH -->|pay| EP
EP -->|redirect| CH
CH -->|pay| C2

@enduml
